{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20748_1
|class_id=20748
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20748_2
|fame=14
|art=17
|fth=30
|civ=16
|tech=13
|ss1=Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail HP +30<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail ATK +3<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail DEF +3<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail RUSH +3<br>Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss2=Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail HP +60<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail ATK +6<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail DEF +6<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail RUSH +6<br>Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss3=Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail HP +90<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail ATK +9<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail DEF +9<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail RUSH +9<br>Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss4=Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail HP +90<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail ATK +9<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail DEF +9<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail RUSH +9<br>Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
|ss7=Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail HP +90<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail ATK +9<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail DEF +9<br>Per Dragon Form Tier, Snail RUSH +9<br>Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9<br> (Awakened)
}}
